summaryJson: {"totalTests":22,"passedTests":19,"failedTests":3,"coveragePercent":89.27939156773041,"durationMs":45761.51644022882,"issues":[{"severity":"medium","title":"Edge case: empty string in required fields not rejected","description":"Zod validation passes for fields with whitespace-only strings in the name field.","fixSuggestion":"Use `.trim().min(1)` instead of `.min(1)` in your Zod schema for string fields."},{"severity":"low","title":"Inconsistent error response format on 500 errors","description":"Unhandled exceptions return raw stack traces in development, different format from handled errors.","fixSuggestion":"Add a global error handler that normalizes all error responses to `{ error: { code, message } }`."}]}

issues.title: Edge case: empty string in required fields not rejected
issues.description: Zod validation passes for fields with whitespace-only strings in the name field.
issues.fixSuggestion: Use `.trim().min(1)` instead of `.min(1)` in your Zod schema for string fields.

issues.title: Inconsistent error response format on 500 errors
issues.description: Unhandled exceptions return raw stack traces in development, different format from handled errors.
issues.fixSuggestion: Add a global error handler that normalizes all error responses to `{ error: { code, message } }`.
